notes: Core spend is concentrated in click fraud protection (highest scores and CPCs), positioned as the flagship high-priority campaign, while scripts, landing pages, and negative keyword management are bundled as supporting Google Ads management services. Informational, DIY 'how-to/example/list' queries and competitor brand terms (Lunio, PPC Protect) were excluded since they signal research or rival intent rather than a buying decision.
